en: Or you could not eat the cornballs and let your kid lead his own life.
ko: 아니면, 옥수수볼을 먹지 말고 아이가 자신의 삶을 살게 할 수도 있어.
ja: あるいはコーンボールを食べないで、子供に自分の人生を歩ませることもできるだろ。
zhTW: 或者，你可以不吃炸玉米球，讓你的孩子過自己的生活。
vi: Hoac, ban co the khong an cornball va de con tu song cuoc doi cua no.

en: Please, he loves this, am I right? Actually, I can't really go today.
ja: まさか。この子これが好きだよ、だろ？
vi: Lam on. No thich cai nay, dung khong?

en: How's that? My bike needs a tune-up or something.
ja: 自転車の整備が必要なんだ。
vi: Xe dap cua con can bao tri.

en: Let's not blame the bike, okay?
ja: 自転車のせいにするなよ。
vi: Dung do loi cho xe dap.

en: It's the poor carpenter that blames his shoddy tools for the...
ko: 형편없는 도구 탓하는 건 가난한 목수뿐이야... 아야!
ja: ダメな大工は自分のボロい道具のせいにする…痛っ！
zhTW: 爛木匠才會怪自己的爛工具...啊！
vi: Tho moc kem moi do loi cho dung cu te cua minh... Au!

en: Jesus Christ! Oh, stupid cornballing piece of...
ja: くそ！このクソコーンボーラーが！
zhTW: 啊！這該死的炸玉米球機！
vi: Ah! Cai may cornball kho chiu!

en: So I'm gonna go, okay? Yeah, yeah, it's fine. It's good, it's okay.
Have fun. Getting too old for his daddy?
ja: パパには大きくなりすぎた？
zhTW: 你對他爸來說太大了嗎？
vi: Lon qua de choi voi bo roi a?

en: No, he'll be fine. And I would buy him a faster bike if we weren't trying to save every...
ja: 節約してなければもっといい自転車を買ってやるんだけど…
zhTW: 如果我們不是在省每一分錢的話，我會買一台更快的腳踏車給他....
vi: Toi se mua cho no xe dap nhanh hon neu chung toi khong co tiet kiem...

en: Did you go shopping? Oh yeah, don't worry about it. I'd pay for it myself.
With what? Company credit card. You're returning them?
ko: 회사 신용카드로. 그거 반납할 거야? 고마워!
ja: 会社のクレジットカードで。返品するの？ありがとう！
zhTW: 公司信用卡。你要退貨嗎？謝啦！
vi: The tin dung cong ty. Ban se tra lai chu? Cam on!

en: Get a job! Michael? Hey, the cornballer!
ja: マイケル？おい、コーンボーラー！

en: Thought these things were only legal in Mexico. In fact, the cornballer wasn't legal anywhere.
ja: これメキシコでしか合法じゃないと思ってた。
zhTW: 我以為這東西只有在墨西哥才合法。
vi: Toi tuong may nay chi hop phap o Mexico.
